raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"Contribution claims—adaptive termination, image-encoder agnosticism, successor positioning—must be verified for internal coherence and accuracy against what the experiments actually show.","R1.2":"The causal chain from ablation (Section 4) to the conclusion that debate dynamics rather than raw scale drive the gain needs logical scrutiny; the argument is load-bearing for the entire framing.","R1.3":"Three sets of specific F1 deltas (MIMIC-CXR +0.017, IU X-Ray +0.014, private +0.016) are the primary empirical support; whether reported numbers are consistent with described methodology must be checked.","R1.7":"The baseline is cited as 'Anonymous Authors, 2024', which is the authors' own prior work under a double-blind token — this raises a self-attribution / blind-review integrity concern that must be flagged."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the check focus on scientific soundness (logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, citation integrity), or on writing quality and prose polish — or both with equal weight?"}

rationale.R1.1: Contribution claims—adaptive termination, image-encoder agnosticism, successor positioning—must be verified for internal coherence and accuracy against what the experiments actually show.
rationale.R1.2: The causal chain from ablation (Section 4) to the conclusion that debate dynamics rather than raw scale drive the gain needs logical scrutiny; the argument is load-bearing for the entire framing.
rationale.R1.3: Three sets of specific F1 deltas (MIMIC-CXR +0.017, IU X-Ray +0.014, private +0.016) are the primary empirical support; whether reported numbers are consistent with described methodology must be checked.
rationale.R1.7: The baseline is cited as 'Anonymous Authors, 2024', which is the authors' own prior work under a double-blind token — this raises a self-attribution / blind-review integrity concern that must be flagged.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the check focus on scientific soundness (logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, citation integrity), or on writing quality and prose polish — or both with equal weight?
